overall.description: First-person gameplay footage showing a player character walking through a modern urban rooftop helipad and interior corridors. The player moves from an outdoor helipad with a helicopter, enters a sleek contemporary building, explores minimalist hallways, and returns to the rooftop to approach a distinctive red tree.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop helipad with city skyline view

events.description: turns right and walks toward building entrance, passing red tree

agents.ego_description: walking along rooftop edge from helipad toward building entrance, holding pistol

entered.detail: white helicopter parked on green helipad with H marking
green artificial turf landing pad with white circular markings
cluster of modern glass skyscrapers across the water body
calm water separating rooftop from downtown skyline
white metal safety railing along rooftop edge
large ornamental tree with bright red foliage in concrete planter

segments.scene_description: The player stands on a rooftop helipad overlooking a modern city skyline across the water. A white helicopter sits on the green landing pad. The player walks along the concrete rooftop, passing a distinctive red-leaved tree, and approaches a building entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern office corridor with frosted glass walls

events.description: enters building through automatic glass doors from rooftop

agents.ego_description: walking through automatic sliding doors into a brightly lit interior corridor

entered.detail: sliding glass doors with green exit sign overhead
large frosted glass panels lining the corridor wall
rectangular recessed LED light panels in white ceiling
glass doors at far end of corridor leading to secondary hallway

segments.scene_description: The player enters a modern building through automatic glass doors, transitioning from the bright exterior to a clean interior corridor. The hallway features frosted glass windows on the left, polished floors with a blue stripe, and leads toward another set of doors at the far end.

events.description: passes through interior doors into secondary hallway with access signage
turns around and heads back toward the main corridor exit

agents.ego_description: moving through secondary hallways, briefly approaching a stairwell before turning back toward the exit

entered.detail: wall-mounted sign with letter A and Japanese text indicating access
staircase leading downward with glass panel doors
dome security camera mounted on ceiling

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a set of doors into a darker interior hallway featuring access signage and a stairwell. After briefly exploring, the player turns around and returns through the bright main corridor, heading back toward the rooftop exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop terrace with ornamental red tree

events.description: exits building back to rooftop terrace with city view
approaches and circles around the large red tree

agents.ego_description: exiting the building and approaching a large red-leaved tree, circling around it to view from multiple angles

entered.detail: large ornamental tree with vibrant red foliage in rectangular planter
wooden slatted bench seating along rooftop edge
sunlit modern skyscrapers visible across the water

segments.scene_description: The player exits back onto the sunlit rooftop terrace, with the city skyline visible in the distance. The camera approaches and circles around the distinctive red tree, showcasing its bright foliage against the urban backdrop and morning sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright urban rooftop into the sterile interior of a modern building before returning to the open air. It begins on a concrete helipad beside a white helicopter, moving past a vibrant red-leaved tree toward a building entrance. As the player passes through automatic glass doors, the scene shifts from the sunlit skyline to a clean interior corridor characterized by polished floors with a blue stripe and frosted glass windows. The camera then pushes further into a darker service hallway with access signage and a stairwell before turning back through the bright main corridor toward the exit. Finally, the movement leads back onto the sunlit rooftop terrace, where the camera circles the distinctive red tree against the backdrop of the distant city and morning sky.
